title: May 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 15''' is the 135th day of the year (136th in leap years). There are 230 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1977]] – [[Mel Zwyer]] is born.
*1977 – [[Wikipedia:The New York Times|''The New York Times'']] published the first advertisements for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']], only ten days before its premiere.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 86|''Star Wars'' (1977) 86]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Insider 49|''Star Wars Insider'' 49]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 42|''Star Wars'' (1998) 42]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' expansion released.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 20]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Timeline 2: The Mandalorian Blockade is Broken]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars: Darth Maul—Death Sentence (TPB)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' trade paperback]] published.
*2013 – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 2|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 2]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''James Cameron's Story of Science Fiction'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 66|''Star Wars'' (2015) 66]] published.
*2019 – [[TIE Fighter 2|''TIE Fighter'' 2]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion - Lando Calrissian 1|''Age of Rebellion - Lando Calrissian'' 1]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Cast]]" premieres on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Mace Windu 4|''Mace Windu'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] - ''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]: A Pirate's Fortune'' released.
<noinclude>
